source_display: Product-Revenue Linkage Test for AI Safety

target_display: Friends of Next Play: AI Fundamentals
evidence: The N5 OS is this idea of how do you use AI to make you less dumb and more smart? Helping it be aware of our biases, checking ourselves when we make claims of a certain type, remembering things in the right moments.
